articles.title: OpenAI files for IPO, says AI should not concentrate power as it enters ‘third phase’ of growth
articles.description: Alongside the IPO announcement, OpenAI chief executive officer Sam Altman published a lengthy post outlining the company's vision for the next phase of AI development, arguing that artificial intelligence should be broadly distributed rather than controlled by a handful of companies or governments.

articles.title: UPSC Prelims Result 2026 Date & Time: When and where to download IAS, IPS and IFS result PDF at upsconline.nic.in
articles.description: UPSC Prelims Result 2026 Date: Aspirants await the UPSC Civil Services Prelims 2026 results, expected in the second week of June based on past trends. The exam saw 5.49 lakh candidates vying for 933 vacancies. While General Studies Paper-I was deemed challenging, the CSAT paper, despite new formats, was manageable for prepared candidates. Three new exam centres were added this year.

articles.title: Janhvi Kapoor Peddi Controversy: Jaya Bachchan Spills Old Secrets, Kangana Ranaut Jumps In
articles.description: The controversy around Janhvi Kapoor's film Peddi has blown up. Did she really face objectification? What secret did Jaya Bachchan reveal about her own career? Why are Kareena Kapoor and Kangana Ranaut giving such different opinions? And why is Peddi co-star Jagapathi Babu openly supporting Janhvi?

articles.title: 2 workers die after falling into sewage treatment plant tank in Faridabad
articles.description: Tragedy struck a Faridabad sewage plant Tuesday morning as two workers, Akash and Aman, lost their lives after falling into a treatment tank. Akash fell when his safety belt broke during maintenance, and Aman tragically followed while attempting a rescue. Authorities are investigating potential safety lapses.

articles.description: While Perry dazzled with her red-carpet glamour, Trudeau brought his trademark polished charm, creating a couple style moment that dominated headlines.

articles.title: Bengaluru CEO pays auto driver Rs 15,682 instead of Rs 156 on busy morning. What happened next
articles.description: The incident came to public attention through a LinkedIn post shared by the passenger named Shubham Gune, founder and CEO of Hinglish, who recounted how a simple payment error during a stressful morning unexpectedly turned into a memorable act of kindness.

articles.title: Ben Stokes nightclub controversy: What happened between England captain, Gus Atkinson and rugby player?
articles.description: Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson are under ECB investigation after breaching a midnight curfew and becoming involved in a nightclub altercation in Chelsea. Reports claim a Saracens academy rugby player threw a punch at Atkinson but hit an ECB security guard, who needed stitches. ECB sources insist the cricketers “were not the aggressors.” Stokes’s captaincy is now under scrutiny.

articles.title: Iran US Israel War Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Deal Could Come Within ‘Two Or Three Days’
articles.description: The US Army's Apache helicopter gunship reportedly crashed near the Strait of Hormuz, however, the pilots on board were safe. Meanwhile, Iran and Israel announced a halt in strikes, leading the way for a potential ceasefire deal between Tehran and Washington. The conflict between Iran and Israel threatened to wreck Washington's efforts to reach an agreement with Tehran to end a war that began in February. However, a report later claimed that Trump has warned Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu that if the country resumes the war with Iran, he would soon be "left on his own". "I said, 'Bibi, you better be careful, or you will be on your own very soon,'" Trump told Axios.

articles.title: Another war front opens? Trump's Mid-East ally hit by missile scare as it vanishes near Yemen border
articles.description: Panic spread across the Gulf after air raid sirens sounded in Saudi Arabia, sparking speculation that a key Saudi military base had come under attack. Riyadh later denied the reports, saying a missile launched from Yemen had deviated from its course and triggered precautionary alerts. The incident unfolded as Iran and Israel exchanged fresh strikes, while Yemen’s Houthis claimed new missile attacks on Israeli targets and threatened shipping routes in the Red Sea. With Donald Trump urging both sides to stop firing, fears of a wider Middle East war are once again rising.

articles.description: June 2026 promises significant professional advancements and recognition for several zodiac signs, driven by favorable planetary alignments. Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn, Leo, and Scorpio are poised for promotions, new opportunities, and career transformations as their hard work and talents are finally noticed and rewarded.

articles.title: Dead or alive? Iran’s top commander Ahmad Vahidi at center of growing mystery after Israeli strikes
articles.description: Rumours are swirling over the fate of Iranian military commander Ahmad Vahidi after unverified reports claimed he may have been killed in recent Israeli strikes on Tehran. While there has been no official confirmation from either Iran or Israel, the speculation has intensified amid rising tensions, ceasefire uncertainty, and renewed warnings from both Tehran and Tel Aviv.

articles.title: Shah Rukh Khan makes stylish appearance with son AbRam at Mumbai airport - Watch
articles.description: Shah Rukh Khan was spotted at Mumbai airport with his son AbRam Khan, turning heads with his stylish appearance. The superstar shared a sweet father-son moment as he held AbRam’s hand while making his way to the terminal.

articles.description: The information supplied by the CPCB following an RTI application file by advocate Kamal Anand from Punjab, reveals that since 2018 the penalties were imposed across various sectors, including chemical industry.

articles.title: ‘Rogue U.S Cities & States Not Cooperating’: Rep. Arrington DESTROYS House Dems In Roaring Testimony
articles.description: A fiery debate over immigration enforcement erupted on Capitol Hill as Republican Representative Jodey Arrington defended increased funding for border security and ICE operations while criticizing Democratic opposition. During a heated hearing, Arrington argued that some cities and states were failing to cooperate with federal immigration authorities, describing the situation as a major obstacle to enforcing U.S. immigration laws. The testimony quickly became one of the most contentious moments of the hearing, drawing strong reactions from both sides. Watch.

articles.title: US lawmakers cheer as court blocks $100,000 H-1B fee in major blow to Trump visa curbs
articles.description: US lawmakers welcomed a court ruling blocking a proposed USD 100,000 H-1B visa fee, despite White House plans to appeal. The decision crucially protects the vital employment pipeline for highly skilled Indian professionals, who systematically secure the majority of these 85,000 annual US work permits.

articles.title: Air Force sergeant held for attempting to murder woman over suspicion of infidelity
articles.description: An IAF sergeant, Sachin Mandhve, was arrested for allegedly attempting to murder a woman during an argument over her character at a hospital parking lot.

articles.title: “BTS works in an organic and fluid way": Football fans make BTS’ “Dynamite” the unofficial anthem of the FIFA World Cup online
articles.description: BTS’ hit song “Dynamite” has unexpectedly become part of a viral FIFA World Cup trend on TikTok and X. Football fans are using the track in South Korea-themed match edits, with several clips reportedly crossing 500,000 likes. The trend sparked hilarious reactions from ARMY members, many surprised that even non-K-pop fans know the song. Social media users say the crossover feels natural, proving BTS’ global cultural influence continues to stretch far beyond music and into sports culture.

articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s reported breakup deal with Georgina Rodriguez could cost him over $114,000 every month
articles.description: Cristiano Ronaldo and Georgina Rodriguez’s engagement announcement has sparked fresh attention around their reported financial agreement. Reports claim that if the couple ever separates, Rodriguez could receive more than $114,000 every month for life, along with ownership of Ronaldo’s Madrid mansion. The arrangement reportedly protects Ronaldo’s billion-dollar fortune while ensuring long-term financial security for Rodriguez and their children. The story has quickly become one of the most talked-about celebrity and football headlines online.

articles.title: OpenAI Confidentially Files For US IPO

articles.title: “33 points non negotiables list”: Morgan Riddle drops surprising Taylor Fritz breakup stance on dating athletes again
articles.description: Morgan Riddle revealed in an interview with Elle that she and tennis star Taylor Fritz ended their six-year relationship around two months ago. While saying they remain on good terms, Riddle also stated she will “never date an athlete again.” She emphasized the importance of financial independence, personal growth, and building her own career as she begins a new chapter in New York.

articles.title: ‘Kristi Noem Stole Billions’: Trump 'Corruption' Bombshell Rocks Cong During ICE Hearing | US House
articles.description: Democratic Representative Mary Gay Scanlon used a contentious congressional hearing on a proposed $70 billion funding increase for U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to raise concerns about accountability within the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). Arguing against the funding package, Scanlon alleged widespread corruption within the department and accused former DHS Secretary Kristi Noem and her associates of involvement in misconduct worth billions of dollars. The claims intensified an already heated debate over immigration enforcement, government oversight, and federal spending, as lawmakers sparred over whether ICE should receive a major expansion of resources and authority.

articles.title: Oil tanker catches fire near Oman; 24 Indian seafarers safe
articles.description: An empty oil tanker, MT Marivex, caught fire near Oman on Monday. All 24 Indian seafarers on board are safe. The vessel was outside the Strait of Hormuz when the incident occurred. The cause of the fire is under investigation. This event happened amidst heightened tensions between Iran and Israel, which saw exchanges of attacks.
